jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Testbook
jsonLd.description:
Testbook invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Testbook:
Testbook is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook!
